channel.title: youtube on Thibault Meunier
channel.description: Recent content in youtube on Thibault Meunier

item.title: Why should I give you my ID card
item.description: Today, Youtube asked me to verify my age. To do so, I got asked to either enter a credit card in my name, or to upload my ID card. And that’s a no. I won’t. Why should I? Youtube and European regulations Digging more into this, I find out that Youtube posted a blog on September 22, 2020, annoucing the new changes. In this blog post, titled Using technology to more consistently apply age restrictions, Youtube team goes over the forthcoming European Union’s Audiovisual Media Services Directive, and how, under this directive, they have to make sure their user is over 18.
